Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface IVisitor2

All Superinterfaces:
IVisitor
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultVisitor, FormulaIndexer, SourceLocationChecker, SourceLocationOriginChecker
public interface IVisitor2 extends IVisitor
This interface extends IVisitor to add support for predicate variables.
Since:
1.2
See Also:
  • Formula.accept(IVisitor)
  • DefaultVisitor

  • Method Details

    • visitPREDICATE_VARIABLE

      boolean visitPREDICATE_VARIABLE(PredicateVariable predVar)
      Visits a PREDICATE_VARIABLE node.
      Parameters:
      predVar - the node to visit
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the siblings of the given node, true to continue visiting
      See Also:
      • Formula.accept(IVisitor)
